# Bitquery Docs

> Bitquery is a blockchain data platform for builders who need trades, prices, and history
> without running their own nodes. Query or stream data across 40+ chains through GraphQL,
> WebSocket, Kafka, and Solana gRPC — or ask in plain English via the MCP server for AI agents.

## Start here

- [Docs home](https://docs.bitquery.io/) — platform overview and navigation
- [GraphQL IDE](https://ide.bitquery.io/) — run queries in the browser, no setup
- [First query in 5 minutes](/docs/start/first-query/)
- [API keys & authentication](/docs/authorization/how-to-generate/)
- [MCP Server for AI agents](/docs/mcp/mcp-server/)

## Trading data — prices, trades & OHLCV

Most teams building charts, bots, or dashboards start here. The **Trading cube** gives you
clean, MEV-filtered swap data with USD price, market cap, and supply on every row.

- [Trading data overview](/docs/trading/trading-data-overview/) — when to use Trading cube vs chain-level APIs
- [Crypto Trades API](/docs/trading/crypto-trades-api/trades-api/) — real-time DEX swaps across 9 chains in one query
- [Crypto Price API](/docs/trading/crypto-price-api/introduction/) — token prices, pairs, and aggregated feeds
- [OHLC / candlestick (K-line) API](/docs/trading/crypto-price-api/crypto-ohlc-candle-k-line-api/) — build charts and technical indicators
- [Market cap & supply fields](/docs/trading/crypto-price-api/crypto-marketcap-api/) — FDV, circulating supply on trade rows
- [Traders API](/docs/trading/crypto-trades-api/traders-api/) — wallet-level trade history and PnL-style analytics

For **historical OHLC older than ~30 days**, use chain-level [`DEXTradeByTokens`](/docs/cubes/dextradesbyTokens) instead of the Trading cube.

## Historical data & bulk uploads

Need a full backfill, data lake, or warehouse load — not row-by-row GraphQL?

- [Cloud datasets overview](/docs/cloud/) — Parquet exports to S3, GCS, Snowflake, BigQuery
- [EVM historical dumps](/docs/cloud/evm/) — Ethereum, Polygon, Base, and other EVM chains
- [Solana historical dumps](/docs/cloud/solana/)
- [BSC / BNB Chain dumps](/docs/cloud/bsc/)
- [Sample data on GitHub](https://github.com/bitquery/blockchain-cloud-data-dump-sample) — explore schemas before you buy

Contact [sales@bitquery.io](mailto:sales@bitquery.io) for custom historical exports and upload schedules.

- [GraphQL queries](/docs/graphql/query/)

- [Solana gRPC / Protobuf](/docs/streams/protobuf/chains/Solana-protobuf/)

- [Polymarket API](/docs/examples/polymarket-api/polymarket-api/)
